ddls:
CREATE TABLE "foods" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "food_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine category */,
  "price" TEXT /* Base price of the food item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food item */,
  "preparation_method" TEXT /* Preparation method for the food item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food item was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the food item (e.g., active, inactive, seasonal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foods_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "cuisine_number" INTEGER /* Cuisine number for internal tracking */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cuisine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cuisine was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cuisine was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the ingredient */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_ingredients" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the food item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food-ingredient mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food-ingredient mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant chain */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant chain */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the chain operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant chain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant chain was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_chains_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant chain */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently available on the menu */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES restaurant_chains ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the food item in the region */,
  "seasonal_discount" TEXT /* Seasonal discount applied to the food item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, chef, admin) */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant chain the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES restaurant_chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_category_mappings" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food-category mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food-category mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_name" TEXT /* Name of the coupon */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount amount offered by the coupon */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the coupon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coupon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coupon was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the food item ordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
